opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel incredibly weak and dizzy when I try to stand up, and my chest feels heavy. The nurse is here with me on the call, she noticed I've gone a bit strange this afternoon.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The nurse called because I seemed unsteady and a bit out of it this afternoon, and I nearly fell trying to get from my bed to the chair.

symptom_narrative.onset: the weakness and dizziness have been getting worse over the last day or so
symptom_narrative.duration: worsening over about 24 hours, more noticeable today
symptom_narrative.character: profound tiredness and a heavy feeling in my chest, and I feel unsteady and lightheaded, especially when I stand
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: quite severe, I feel like I could barely make it out of bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: general weakness all over, and a heavy feeling in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse when I try to stand or move around
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still in bed seems to help a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to get up or move
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nearly lost my balance getting from the bed to the chair, but I didn't actually faint or lose consciousness
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've noticed I haven't been able to do as much as usual for a few weeks, but nothing this bad before today
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I normally get around with my walking frame but I've been staying in bed today because I feel too dizzy and weak to move safely

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a heart rate tablet, twice a day
a small daily heart tablet, I think for my heart rhythm

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: not fully aware of how unwell she currently is; mentation is sluggish and she may be under-reporting severity

communication_style.typical_message_style: slow to respond, gives brief answers, nursing staff often needed to supplement or clarify her responses

access_barriers.other: patient's own reporting may be unreliable due to sluggish mentation this afternoon; nursing staff present and providing corroborating/additional history

objective_data_offered.timing: checked by nursing staff this afternoon
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: measured by facility nursing staff on a ward device, not independently verified by the telehealth clinician

objective_data_offered.timing: checked by nursing staff this afternoon
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: measured by facility nursing staff, single reading, not independently verified by the telehealth clinician

objective_data_offered.timing: checked by nursing staff this afternoon
